name: End of Rainbow
description: You are on a narrow, rocky strip of ground where the river continues beyond the spillway. The canyon walls press in close, limiting both space and ambition, while sunlight reaches down just enough to suggest this area was never meant to be enclosed. Overhead, a persistent band of refracted light spans the drop to the east. At its terminus sits a conspicuously placed pot of gold, shimmering with the confidence of an asset that passed inspection.
